memories.text: All .gd script functions must have Chinese comment (# 注释) written ABOVE the function declaration, not inside the function body. Example: `# 初始化游戏\nfunc _ready():`
Rebalanced 4 towers per standard model (commit 8c07a7f): Arrow(50g) dmg8→10; Magic(70g) dmg30→24; Cannon(80g) dmg30→43 range60→120 + new AoE cannon_shell splash50/0.35; Mage(75g) unchanged

Fixed `panel_level_select.gd:39` parse error: `label.theme_override_colors/font_color = Color(...)` → `label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(...))`. Removed `generate_mode` export from `game_level.gd` (auto-detect via `$TowerSlots.get_child_count() > 0`). Removed `root.set("generate_mode", false)` from plugin.gd.
